title: Tools & Equipment
goal: Name common hand tools and ask for them on site.

completionCriteria.summary: Finish the quiz with at least 80%.

vocabulary.example: I need a screwdriver for this.
Use the wrench on this bolt.
Cut the wood with the saw.
The tools are in the toolbox.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: Good morning. Are you ready to work?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.line: Thank you. I also need a screwdriver.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: Here you are. Do you have the drill?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.line: No. Can you pass me the drill, please?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: Sure. Please use the wrench for the big bolt.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.line: Okay. Where is the tape measure?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: It is on the table. Be careful with the saw.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.line: I will. Thank you for your help.

multipleChoice.prompt: You want to hit a nail. Which tool do you use?
multipleChoice.explanation: A hammer is used to hit nails.

multipleChoice.prompt: You want to make a hole. Which tool do you use?
Where do you keep your tools?
Which tool do you use to measure length?

fillBlank.prompt: Please pass me the ___ to hit the nail.
fillBlank.explanation: A hammer is used to hit a nail.

fillBlank.prompt: Use the ___ to tighten the bolt.

fillBlank.explanation: Tools are kept in the toolbox.

matching.instruction: Match the word to its meaning.
Match the word to its meaning.
